name: Bowl of the Wife of Kit Carson
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup cooked chicken or turkey meat, in piece
1/4 cup Monterey Jack or Muenster Cheese, cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the broth to boiling and add chicken (or turkey), garbanzos, chipotle pepper, rice, and oregano.
2. Serve in large individual bowls.
3. Add cheese pieces and avocado just prior to serving.
